metadata.title: The Lounge Pilsen
metadata.description: The Lounge - shisha bar, where you can choose from a rich selection of hookahs and drinks. You can find us in the historical center of Pilsen, just a few steps from náměstí Republiky.

hero.title: The Lounge<break></break>Pilsen
hero.imageAlt: The Lounge Pilsen shisha bar interior

about.description: Experience unforgettable moments in the shisha bar The Lounge, which will interest you with interior as well as a rich selection of hookahs and drinks. You can find us in the historical center of Pilsen, just a few steps from Republica square (náměstí Republiky).

food.title: <highlight>Hot dogs</highlight> and french fries
food.description: Wide selection of hot dogs and french fries. Download our menu and browse our complete offer.

hookah.title: <highlight>Hookahs</highlight> with black and light tobacco
hookah.description: Premium tobaccos - Darkside, Element, Tangiers. You have many flavors to choose from.

alcohol.title: <highlight>Premium</highlight> alcohol and wines
alcohol.description: Cheaper or premium rums, whiskeys, gins, vodkas and other spirits of all kinds. There is also premium South African wines of the Phant brand.
alcohol.imageAlt: The Lounge bar and alcohol offer

drinks.title: <highlight>Cocktails</highlight> and homemade lemonades
drinks.description: Selection of more than 30 of the best cocktails, the possibility of variation. Quality homemade lemonades that you won't get anywhere else.
drinks.imageAlt: Cocktails and homemade lemonades at The Lounge
